name: newnop-assignment
description: Full-stack task management assignment for Newnop.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server

author: Lahiru
